name: Fingerprint Grow → Aura Led Control
description: Controls the Aura LED on the reader. Only available on select models. NOTE: The R503 has 2 variants with different LED colour options.

config_entries.label: Color
config_entries.description: The LED color to activate. For R503, one of `RED`, `BLUE` and `PURPLE`. For R503-RGB, one of `RED`, `BLUE`, `PURPLE`, `GREEN`, `YELLOW`, `CYAN` and `WHITE`.

config_entries.label: Count
config_entries.description: How many times to repeat the pattern. Only relevant for `BREATHING` and `FLASHING` states. 0 for infinite, or 1 to 255.

config_entries.label: Speed
config_entries.description: The duration each cycle lasts, a factor of 10ms. Only relevant for `BREATHING`, `FLASHING`, `GRADUAL_ON` and `GRADUAL_OFF` states. The total duration is defined by 10ms *speed* count. Range is 0 to 255.

config_entries.label: State
config_entries.description: The state to set the LED. One of `BREATHING`, `FLASHING`, `ALWAYS_ON`, `ALWAYS_OFF`, `GRADUAL_ON` and `GRADUAL_OFF`.
